items.title: Alonso confirms Chelsea captain and reveals Fernandez transfer stance
items.summary: Xabi Alonso says defender Reece James will remain Chelsea captain - and he wants Enzo Fernandez to stay at the club.

items.title: Rice fit and available to start for England vs Argentina
items.summary: Declan Rice is fit and available to start England's World Cup semi-final against Argentina on Wednesday, Sky Sports News understands.

items.title: ITV World Cup commentator packs his bags and boards plane home immediately ahead of England vs Argentina semi-final
items.summary: ITV commentator Andros Townsend has revealed that he is flying home after completing all of his games as a World Cup commentator. items.title: World Matchplay 2026: All you need to know as Littler defends his title
items.summary: The 2026 Matchplay is just around the corner so here is everything you need to know about the men's and women's tournaments, live on Sky Sports...

items.title: Time for Lamine Yamal to ignite? Or another Mbappe World Cup masterclass?
items.summary: France face Spain for a place in the World Cup final on Tuesday, meaning a showdown between Kylian Mbappe and Lamine Yamal. Who comes out on top?

items.title: Who will win the World Cup? The view from the semi-finalists
items.summary: BBC Sport speaks to journalists and fans from the World Cup's four semi-finalists to see who they think will win the tournament.
